meta.name: Jhonas Sotero
meta.title: Jhonas Sotero | Full Stack Web Developer

home.headline: Hi, I am Jhonas Sotero a Full Stack Web Developer
home.tagline: Building scalable web and mobile applications with React, PHP, and JavaScript. Delivering real-world solutions through clean, performant code.

skills.title: Full Stack Web Development
skills.desc: Building modern web applications using React, Vite, PHP, Tailwind CSS, and REST APIs. Experienced in both frontend UI design and backend API development.

skills.title: Mobile Development
skills.desc: Developing Android applications using Java and Firebase. Delivering real-time, scalable mobile solutions with push notifications and seamless user experience.

skills.title: Database & API Integration
skills.desc: Skilled in MySQL and Firebase Realtime Database. Experienced in designing schemas, building REST APIs, and ensuring data integrity across platforms.

home.cta_banner: Ready to Bring Your Idea to Life?

bio: An IT graduate and Full Stack Web Developer skilled in React, PHP, JavaScript, and Android Development. Served as lead developer of SmartEssay, an AI-based capstone mobile application for automated essay scoring and feedback at STI College San Pablo.

Earned National Champion recognition at Tagisan ng Talino: Codefest 2025. Experienced in building scalable web and mobile applications, REST API integration, and delivering solutions to real-world problems.
about.what_i_do_sub: I build full-stack web and mobile applications, design REST APIs, and develop scalable enterprise solutions using modern technologies.

qualifications.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

certifications.desc: Tagisan ng Talino: Codefest — National Champion 2025
Tagisan ng Talino: Codefest — Cluster Contender 2024
Full Stack Web Development Certificate — Udemy, 2025

projects.title: Centra Suite
projects.desc: A full-stack multi-tenant SaaS platform with inventory management, POS, and branch account control using role-based access (Owner / Branch Manager).
projects.detail: Built with React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, TanStack React Query v5, PHP, MySQL, and JWT. Includes RESTful API, OTP email verification, real-time POS with cart, discounts, payments, and automatic inventory updates.

projects.title: Smart Essay
projects.desc: An AI-based Android system using OCR and NLP to evaluate student essays and provide structured rubric-based feedback for STI College San Pablo.
projects.detail: Built using Android (Java) and Firebase for real-time data storage and user authentication. Capstone project that earned National Champion at Tagisan ng Talino: Codefest 2025.

projects.title: HRIS System
projects.desc: A full-stack HR management platform for employee data management, payroll processing, and core HR operations.
projects.detail: Built with React, Vite, JavaScript, and MySQL. Features a responsive UI with integrated REST APIs for backend communication and real-time data management.

projects.title: Kuya App
projects.desc: A real-time mobile delivery app designed to connect vendors, couriers, food providers, and consumers within the community.
projects.detail: Built using Android (Java) and Firebase, providing seamless order tracking with real-time updates, push notifications, and an intuitive driver-partner interface for streamlined last-mile delivery.

contact.heading: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
contact.sub: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
